harvest.title: Harvest

harvest.offlineNote: You can keep working. All barcode scans are saved to a buffer on Pi. When connection is restored — data will automatically upload to the server.
harvest.tareScaleDesc: Make sure it shows exactly 0 before the first plant
harvest.undoTimeDesc: After recording a plant you have 7 seconds to undo if you made a mistake
harvest.dontSkipDesc: Every skipped plant is minus one day off. Just kidding. Or not. 🙃

harvest.plantInSession: Plant #{{num}} already exists in this harvest session.
harvest.piNoDiag: Pi is not sending diagnostics. Update the Pi client.
harvest.autoWeightNote: No weight entered — scale weight will be used automatically.
harvest.roleWeighingOnly: You're in the {{role}} role — plant recording is only available for the Weighing role.
harvest.canWatchProgress: You can watch the harvest progress below.
harvest.setupRoomMap: Set up the map and place plants in Active Rooms to see harvest progress.
harvest.dataCannotDelete: Data cannot be deleted. You can add or edit error notes.
harvest.setupMapForRows: Set up the room map for row progress.
harvest.onlyWeigherComplete: Only the weigher can complete the harvest
harvest.sessionCompleted: Harvest for this room is completed.
harvest.sessionStats: Total plants recorded: {{count}}, wet weight: {{weight}} g.

harvestComplete.finishNote: Room will be archived. Data below is for the crew report (optional).
